page: Microsoft Azure M128ms_v2 is an x86_64 architecture server belonging to the MSMediumMemoryv2 family. It features 128 dedicated vCPUs powered by Intel processors and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The server is configured with 3892.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 30.41 GB per vCPU.

This instance does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via external block storage, though the hardware is Premium Storage capable. There are zero GPUs integrated into this configuration, and it does not include any complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Given the high density of memory relative to compute resources, this server represents a specialized hardware class designed for memory-intensive workloads. It is qualitatively cost-efficient for applications requiring massive in-memory datasets rather than local disk I/O or GPU acceleration. Appropriate workloads include large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise relational databases, and heavy data analytics pipelines that fit entirely within system RAM.
description: Microsoft Azure M128ms_v2 is a memory-optimized server from the MSMediumMemoryv2 family, designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads. Powered by an Intel processor with x86_64 architecture, this instance provides 128 dedicated vCPUs and 3892.0 GB of RAM, translating to 30.41 GB of memory per core. The virtualized environment runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. This configuration does not include local storage or GPUs, but it is Premium Storage capable, making it reliant on external storage solutions. With its high memory-to-CPU ratio, the M128ms_v2 is engineered for workloads that require massive memory capacity, such as large-scale in-memory databases, data analytics, and enterprise resource planning applications.
og_description: Microsoft Azure M128ms_v2 is a memory-optimized server featuring 128 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 3892.0 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability, designed for large-scale in-memory database workloads.

tagline: A high-capacity memory-optimized virtual machine featuring dedicated compute cores and extensive RAM for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.
